code: import React from'react';import'./TeamStatsCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TeamStatsCard=_ref=>{let{teamName,logo,wins,losses,recentForm,title}=_ref;const getFormEmoji=result=>{if(result==='W')return'✅';if(result==='L')return'❌';return'➖';};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"team-stats-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stats-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stats-logo",children:logo}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"team-title",children:title||teamName})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stats-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-value wins",children:wins}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-label",children:"Wins"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-value losses",children:losses}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-label",children:"Losses"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"stat-value win-rate",children:[Math.round(wins/(wins+losses)*100),"%"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-label",children:"Win Rate"})]})]}),recentForm&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"recent-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"form-label",children:"Recent Form:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"form-results",children:recentForm.map((result,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`form-item ${result.toLowerCase()}`,children:getFormEmoji(result)},index))})]})]});};export default TeamStatsCard;
